title: Duplication detector binds to the rule-script engine via a CLI verb
context: Issue #358 specifies an armed rule-script binding. Verified: findings.schema.json sets additionalProperties:false so a finding carries only file/line/message/severity; and all 34 armed scripts are self-contained zero-dependency regex scanners, while duplication detection needs the chunk index, cosine similarity and the code-knowledge index.

options.label: Thin .mjs shells out to a new duplication scan --json verb
Hand-authored .mjs imports the installed paqad-ai package
Detector runs in-process at checks only; no rule-script binding

rationale: Keeps armed rule-scripts dependency-free (all 34 today are self-contained), keeps the detector as normal testable TypeScript in src/duplication/, and yields a reusable CLI verb. Subprocess cost measured against the AC-7 <3s budget.
